summary: Vite build passes cleanly (exit 0). No critical security vulnerabilities. 5 high + 3 moderate vulnerabilities in dev-only dependencies (vite, rollup, picomatch) — not shipped in the Tauri app bundle, but vite dev server CVEs are exploitable during local development. 7 source files modified and uncommitted (api-server.ts, lib.rs, App.tsx, tauri.conf.json, CLAUDE.md, README.md, .omc/project-memory.json) — Tauri builds from working tree so changes will be included but are unversioned. No TypeScript errors in source files. All essential config files committed.

checks.name: Security Audit (bun audit)
checks.detail: 5 high + 3 moderate vulnerabilities. All in dev dependencies only — NOT shipped in Tauri bundle. HIGH: vite 7.2.6 (GHSA-v2wj-q39q-566r: server.fs.deny bypass; GHSA-p9ff-h696-f583: arbitrary file read via dev server WebSocket), rollup <4.59.0 (GHSA-mw96-cpmx-2vgc: arbitrary file write via path traversal), picomatch <2.3.2 (GHSA-c2c7-rcm5-vvqj: ReDoS). MODERATE: picomatch (GHSA-3v7f-55p6-f55p: method injection), vite (GHSA-4w7w-66w2-5vf9: optimized deps path traversal). Fix: bun update

checks.name: Vite Production Build (bun run build)
checks.detail: Build succeeded in 1.33s. Output: dist/assets/index-Ba5Rf4GB.js (482.96 kB / gzip 135.64 kB), dist/assets/index-DLBLpLCi.css (27.81 kB / gzip 5.80 kB). Two non-fatal Vite warnings about mixed static/dynamic imports of @tauri-apps/plugin-dialog and @tauri-apps/plugin-fs — do not affect functionality.

checks.name: TypeScript Compilation
checks.detail: Zero TypeScript errors in source files (src/). tsc --noEmit reports errors only from src-tauri/target/release/build/*/tauri-codegen-assets/ which are Tauri-generated binary asset files outside the bundler scope. tsconfig.json: strict mode, skipLibCheck:true, moduleResolution:bundler — correct for Vite+React project.

checks.name: Uncommitted Source Files
checks.detail: 7 tracked files modified but not committed: api-server.ts, src-tauri/src/lib.rs, src-tauri/tauri.conf.json, src/App.tsx, CLAUDE.md, README.md, .omc/project-memory.json. Tauri CLI builds from working tree so next tauri:build WILL include these changes unversioned. Also: per project memory, DMG version date = last git commit date — commit before build to get today's date (2026-04-11) in DMG filename.

checks.name: Essential Config Files Committed
checks.detail: All 4 essential config files are git-tracked and committed: vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.cjs.

checks.name: Environment Variables
checks.detail: No .env files present or required. Supabase credentials stored at runtime in portal.json (not build-time env vars). Vite dev proxy: /api -> http://localhost:3001. No VITE_* env vars referenced in source. No build-time secrets needed.

checks.name: Dependency Versions
checks.detail: vite ^7.2.6 installed (7.2.6) — vulnerable, safe version is >=7.3.2. tailwindcss pinned to v3 (correct — compatible with postcss.config.cjs using tailwindcss:{}). @tauri-apps/cli ^2.9.5, @tauri-apps/api ^2.9.1 (current). React 19.2.0, @supabase/supabase-js ^2.99.3 — all current.

checks.name: Tauri Config
checks.detail: src-tauri/tauri.conf.json present. Bundle ID: com.portmanager.portmanager. Window: 1000x1050 (min 800x700). beforeBuildCommand is empty string (correct — avoids Bun/Node ESM conflict per project memory). Capabilities file: src-tauri/capabilities/default.json with fs:allow-write-text-file included.

warnings.description: Vite dev server: server.fs.deny bypass + arbitrary file read via WebSocket. Dev-only risk, not in shipped Tauri bundle.
Arbitrary File Write via Path Traversal. Indirect dep via vite. Dev-only risk.
warnings.recommendation: bun update (resolves transitively when vite is updated)

warnings.description: ReDoS vulnerability via extglob quantifiers. Indirect dep via vite and tailwindcss. Dev-only.
7 modified source files uncommitted. Tauri builds from working tree — changes included in next build but unversioned. DMG version date will be wrong (last commit, not today).
warnings.recommendation: git add api-server.ts src-tauri/src/lib.rs src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src/App.tsx && git commit -m 'chore: pre-build sync' before running tauri:build

warnings.description: Mixed static/dynamic import warnings for @tauri-apps/plugin-dialog and @tauri-apps/plugin-fs. App.tsx uses dynamic import() while PortalManager.tsx uses static import — Vite cannot split these into separate chunks.
warnings.recommendation: Convert dynamic imports in App.tsx to static imports to match PortalManager.tsx pattern.

passed_checks: Zero TypeScript errors in source files (src/)
vite.config.ts committed and correct (port 9000, /api proxy to 3001)
tailwind.config.js committed (v3, compatible with CJS postcss config)
postcss.config.cjs committed (CJS format correct — avoids ESM build error)
Tauri 2 ACL config present with required fs permissions
beforeBuildCommand empty (correct — avoids Bun/Node ESM conflict)
No untracked critical config files missing from git
